programs.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programs.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programs.title: Lingo
programs.desc: A quiz in which three pairs of contestants go head-to-head, using their powers of deduction quickly to work out the words that appear in the Lingo grids and puzzle-words.

programs.title: The Finish Line
programs.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed. George, Beth, Joyce, Matthew and Ria race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try to win £5,000.

programs.title: Entertainment Tonight
programs.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programs.title: MasterChef Australia
programs.desc: It is the first team challenge of the series, and the contestants are all eager to see how well they can work together. The bottom two teams will find themselves in the elimination the following day.

programs.title: My Market Kitchen
programs.desc: Laura makes up an end-of-the-week stir-fry; Tobie prepares a no-bake chocolate and peanut pie; Catherine uses three different kinds of potatoes to make chips.
